title: Fw'Sen-class picket ship

The '''''Fw'sen''-class picket ships''' were small [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] used by the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]]. Although the vessel's main role was to disable enemy vessels and guard Ssi-ruuvi fleets, their delicate frameworks and inefficient shields resulted in them frequently being used in suicide missions.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Ssi-ruuviPicketShip_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Fw'Sen'' [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

Each ''Fw'sen''-class picket ship was crewed by thirteen [[P'w'eck]]s and six [[Entechment|enteched]] servant droids, although the ships were usually remotely piloted by Ssi-ruuk cruisers. This remote piloting option, combined with the design choice to forgo thick hull plating for [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]], demonstrated a Ssi-ruuvi intention to sacrifice the picket ships where tactically necessary.<ref name="TABSB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref>

The ''Fw'sen''-class took the ovoid overlapping shell shape of other Ssi-Ruuvi starships, although it featured a set of four small wings for stabilization during atmospheric flight.

==History==
During the [[Bakura Incident]], and subsequent [[Invasion of Bakura]], the Ssi-Ruuk fielded twenty ''Fw'sen''-class picket ships. The Imperial defenses destroyed five of the ships during the preliminary battle, while another eight were lost during the final [[battle of Bakura]]. Three of the ships were able to escape with the rest of the fleet and four were captured.<ref name="TABSB" /> Years later, ''Fw'sen''-class picket ships were used during a [[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|second invasion of Bakura]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' lists the ship's length at 45 meters, while the ''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' lists it at 50 meters. The two sources also differ on the armament of the picket ship. The former lists the armament of the ships as a pair of bow [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], fin- and keel-mounted [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and six [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], while the later excludes the Super-Charged Turbolaser batteries in description (but not the blueprints).
